originalTitle: DRAGON BALL Xenoverse 2 - FUTURE SAGA Chapter 4 Launch Trailer
content: One final chapter remains. FUTURE SAGA Chapter 4 — the final DLC for DRAGON BALL XENOVERSE 2. The countdown starts now. New reveals every day until launch on July 8, 2026. Follow @dragonballgames on X and Instagram! #DBXV2 Follow Bandai Namco Entertainment: X (Twitter): https://twitter.com/BandaiNamcoUS TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@bandainamcous Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/bandainamcous Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/BandaiNamcoUS Twitch: http://www.twitch.tv/bandainamcous Threads: https://www.threads.com/@bandainamcous Sign up for our newsletter! - https://www.bandainamcoent.com/#signup
chineseSummary: 万代南梦宫娱乐美国 · 207,317 次浏览
chineseContent: 还剩最后一章。 FUTURE SAGA 第 4 章 — 龙珠 XENOVERSE 2 的最终 DLC。倒计时现在开始。每天都会有新内容发布，直到 2026 年 7 月 8 日发布。在 X 和 Instagram 上关注@dragonballgames！ #DBXV2 关注 Bandai Namco Entertainment：X (Twitter)：https://twitter.com/BandaiNamcoUS TikTok：https://www.tiktok.com/@bandainamcous Instagram：https://www.instagram.com/bandainamcous Facebook：https://www.facebook.com/BandaiNamcoUS Twitch：http://www.twitch.tv/bandainamcous 主题： https://www.threads.com/@bandainamcous 订阅我们的时事通讯！ - https://www.bandainamcoent.com/#signup
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
